{# tabs/contacts.html — Vendor contacts list with inline add/edit/delete. Receives: contacts (list of VendorContact ORM objects), vendor_id (int). Called by: views.py vendor_tab endpoint (tab_name='contacts'). Depends on: HTMX (inline edit, delete, add), Alpine.js (add form toggle). #}

Contacts

{# Inline add form #}
{% if contacts %} {% for contact in contacts %} {% include "partials/vendors/contact_row.html" %} {% endfor %}
Name Email Phone Title Status Actions
{% else %}

No contacts found.

{% endif %}
